_comment: Add to /data-access. Mirrors the existing 4-Step Connection Process H3. Resolves F10.
name: How to connect a cloud account to CostSage
description: Connect AWS or Azure to CostSage with read-only access in under 4 minutes via a 4-step approval flow.

supply.name: AWS account with IAM permission to create roles, OR Azure subscription owner permissions

step.name: Sign in to CostSage
step.text: Create a CostSage account at costsage.ai and verify your email. Choose AWS, Azure, or both as the cloud target.

step.name: Launch the read-only role
step.text: Click the one-click CloudFormation (AWS) or ARM template (Azure) link inside CostSage. The template provisions a least-privilege role: ReadOnly + cost-and-usage scopes. No write access is granted at this step.

step.name: Paste the role identifier
step.text: Copy the IAM role ARN (AWS) or service principal ID (Azure) from the deployed template output and paste it into CostSage. The agent verifies access with a single read call before proceeding.

step.name: Review your first savings
step.text: Within minutes the agent surfaces the first batch of cost-saving recommendations. Approve any to enable execution; the agent then provisions a separate scoped write role limited to the actions you approved.
